title: LS Ores and More
description: Adds new ores and items to the game - aiming for a vanilla feel and balance.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0951759181a18d41435b004117bcdefdd3f08f28.png)
# This mod aims to add new ores and items to the game, while still feeling vanilla and balanced.
 
## Content:
- Uranium - a new ore with iron-equivalent stats, but with higher efficiency at the cost of durability
- Iridium - a new ore with iron-equivalent stats, but with more durability at the cost of efficiency
- Super Uranium - an upgraded version of Uranium with stats equivalent to diamond
- Powered Iridium - an upgraded version of Iridium with stats equivalent to diamond
- Uranium Wastes - a new biome with toxic air that will apply the wither effect when breathed too long. Wear Uranium armors or go below Y-level 20 to mitigate this. Uranium spawns more commonly in this biome
- Iridium Valley - a new biome, where Enderman spawn frequently. Iridium spawns more commonly in this biome
- New music discs for the new biomes - available via crafting
- A spear allows quick medium range combat
- Nukes - made with Uranium, they pack a lot of power and are very useful for mining, but pricey
